videos.title: asking UCLA students for college application advice ☆
videos.description:
btw this video was filmed in fall 2021 and i finally finished editing it… yeah it’s been a rough quarter. i’m sure college apps are on the mind for a lot of you bc the results are coming out around now. hopefully this can help those of you who are applying in the next year!
